languages.text: "Однако узость мышления зачастую стоит на пути познания. Задумайся об этом, досточтимый коллега". {n}Джай одаривает манипулуса благодарной улыбкой.{/n}
"Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Однако узость мышления зачастую стоит на пути познания. Задумайся об этом, досточтимый коллега". {n}Джай одаривает манипулуса благодарной улыбкой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}
"Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}
"Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}
"Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

languages.text: «Sin embargo, una mente estrecha a menudo bloquea el camino al conocimiento. Piense en eso, mi estimado colega». {n}Jae sonríe con gratitud al manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sin embargo, una mente estrecha a menudo bloquea el camino al conocimiento. Piense en eso, mi estimado colega». {n}Jae sonríe con gratitud al manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: “然而，狭隘的思想往往会阻断求知之路。好好想想吧，尊敬的同僚。”{n}婕伊向操纵者露出一个感激的笑容。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “然而，狭隘的思想往往会阻断求知之路。好好想想吧，尊敬的同僚。”{n}婕伊向操纵者露出一个感激的笑容。{/n}

languages.text: "Allerdings versperrt ein beschränkter Verstand nicht selten den Weg zum Wissen. Denkt darüber nach, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Jae lächelt den Manipulus dankbar an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Allerdings versperrt ein beschränkter Verstand nicht selten den Weg zum Wissen. Denkt darüber nach, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Jae lächelt den Manipulus dankbar an.{/n}

languages.text: « Pour autant, un esprit étriqué constitue souvent un obstacle à la connaissance. Réfléchissez-y, honorable collègue. » {n}Jae adresse un regard reconnaissant au manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Pour autant, un esprit étriqué constitue souvent un obstacle à la connaissance. Réfléchissez-y, honorable collègue. » {n}Jae adresse un regard reconnaissant au manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: "Yine de dar bir zihin, çoğu zaman irfana giden yolu tıkar. Bunun üzerinde düşün saygıdeğer meslektaşım." {n}Jae, Manipülus'a minnettar bir gülümseme atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yine de dar bir zihin, çoğu zaman irfana giden yolu tıkar. Bunun üzerinde düşün saygıdeğer meslektaşım." {n}Jae, Manipülus'a minnettar bir gülümseme atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「しかし、狭い考えは知識への道をしばしば閉ざします。このことを、尊敬する同僚に考えさせてもらいたいと思います。」{n}ジェイはマニピュラスに感謝の笑顔を見せる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet, a narrow mind frequently bars the path to knowledge. Reflect upon this, esteemed colleague." {n}Jae flashes the Manipulus a grateful smile.{/n}
